data.title: TSLA Stock Sees Multiple Price Target Hikes Days After Long-Time Bear Turned Bullish
data.description: Days after investment bank Roth MKM upgraded its rating on Tesla Inc from neutral to buy, other analysts have hiked price targets.

data.title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai Fires Back At Microsoft Over AI, Dismisses Satya Nadella's Criticism: 'I Would Love To Do A Side-By-Side Comparison...Any Day, Any Time'
data.description: Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai criticized Microsoft's reliance on OpenAI for its AI models while defending Google's innovation and asserting the company's leadership in search and AI amidst rising competition and legal challenges.

data.title: Remember The Iconic 'Bitcoin Pizzas?' They Are Now Worth Nearly $1B As King Crypto Blasts Through $100K
data.description: Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) historic run past the $100,000 mark Thursday made the two legendary pizzas, carved in cryptocurrency history as the first commodity to be purchased with the digital asset, worth over a billion dollars.

data.title: Elon Musk's xAI Raises $6B For The 2nd Time This Year As It Looks To Take The Challenge To OpenAI, Google And Jeff Bezos-Backed Anthropic
data.description: Elon Musk-led xAI disclosed on Thursday that it has raised $6 billion, with nearly 97 investors participating in the fundraising round.
